overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a moonlit grassland at night. The character traverses from tall grass onto a dirt path, encountering a horseback rider who passes by, with mountains visible in the background throughout.

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing the bright crescent moon in the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the ground
large dark mountain silhouette against the night sky
bright crescent moon illuminating the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a cowboy walking through tall grass at night. The camera follows from behind as the character moves toward distant mountains, with the moon becoming visible in the clear night sky around the 5-second mark. The landscape is open and sparse, with scattered bushes and trees visible on the horizon.

events.description: ground surface transitions from tall grass to a worn dirt path
horseback rider gallops past from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path through the grassland

notable_agents.action: rider on dark horse galloping past the character from right to left

entered.detail: worn dirt trail cutting through the grass

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from walking on grass to a compacted dirt path. At approximately 30 seconds, a rider on horseback suddenly appears from the right and gallops past the character, heading left. The path continues straight toward the mountains, with grass lining both sides of the trail.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path toward denser vegetation

entered.detail: dense line of trees marking the edge of a forest

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing along the dirt path as the landscape gradually becomes more wooded. A dense tree line becomes visible on the left side in the distance, indicating an approaching forested area. The moon remains high in the sky, casting cool light over the open grassland and the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit grassland that gradually transitions from open plains into a wooded landscape. It begins with a third-person view of a cowboy walking through tall grass toward distant mountains as the moon emerges in a clear night sky. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from wild grass to a compacted dirt path, where a rider on horseback suddenly gallops past from right to left. The scene then continues along the trail, with the open grassland slowly giving way to a dense tree line appearing on the left. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the cool moonlight as the environment becomes increasingly forested.
